title: RESOURCE FAMILY SUPPORT - 211info
text: WITH LOVE RESOURCE FAMILY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides new and gently used clothing, shoes, toys, books, and supplies. Delivery is available to those living within 30 minutes of the Tigard facility. Scheduled pick-ups at the Tigard facility are available for others, Monday-Friday. There are textured hair care classes for transracial resource parents. 14555 SW 74th Avenue Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Resource parents with children in foster care ages 0-6 (up until 7th birthday) and after the child's case has changed to permanency Hours: By appointment Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to fill out request form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Certifier or caseworkers full name, branch, email, and phone number AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Bedding/Linen * Foster Children Children's Clothing * Foster Children Clothing Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies * Foster Children Shoes * Foster Children Toy Libraries/Toy Loan Programs * Foster Children If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WITH LOVE
